org.sonar.java.checks.BasicAuthCheck.checker_desc: This checker detects the use of HTTP Basic Authentication in specific Java API calls where the authentication header value starts with "Basic".

org.sonar.java.checks.PredictableSeedChe.checker_desc: This checker detects the use of predictable seed values (literals, static final fields, string literal getBytes calls, or new arrays) as arguments to SecureRandom constructors or setSeed methods.

org.sonar.java.checks.SwitchCaseWithoutB.checker_desc: This checker detects switch case groups that may unintentionally fall through to the next case group without an intervening break, return, or throw statement.

org.sonar.java.checks.security.SecureCoo.checker_desc: This checker detects cookie objects created without the secure flag set to true, which could lead to insecure transmission over non-HTTPS connections.

org.sonar.java.checks.MultilineBlocksCur.checker_desc: This checker detects when a statement following a loop or if statement without curly braces is incorrectly indented to appear as part of the loop/if block, but will actually execute outside of it.

org.sonar.java.checks.unused.UnusedMetho.checker_desc: This checker detects unused parameters in method and constructor declarations that can be safely removed.

org.sonar.java.checks.serialization.Seri.checker_desc: This checker detects non-private, non-transient fields in Serializable classes that are not serializable themselves, including fields of non-serializable collection types.

org.sonar.java.checks.SystemExitCalledCh.checker_desc: Detects calls to System.exit, Runtime.getRuntime().exit, or Runtime.getRuntime().halt methods in Java methods and constructors, excluding the main method.

org.sonar.java.checks.EmptyMethodsCheck.checker_desc: This checker reports empty method or constructor bodies that lack explanatory comments and are not excepted by specific annotations or Spring test contexts.

org.sonar.java.checks.regex.RedosCheck.checker_desc: This checker detects regular expressions vulnerable to catastrophic backtracking (exponential or polynomial runtime) due to certain patterns like overlapping repetitions or ambiguous alternatives.

org.sonar.java.checks.ThreadRunCheck.checker_desc: This checker detects direct calls to the `run()` method of `Thread` or its subclasses when not within an overriding `run()` method itself.

org.sonar.java.checks.SyncGetterAndSette.checker_desc: This checker detects when a getter or setter method is synchronized but its corresponding setter or getter method in the same class is not synchronized.

org.sonar.java.checks.PseudoRandomCheck.checker_desc: This checker detects insecure uses of pseudo-random number generators, including specific static method calls and constructor instantiations.

org.sonar.java.checks.CompareObjectWithE.checker_desc: This checker detects equality comparisons (== or !=) between objects where at least one operand is a non-enum class type and both types implement equals, but the comparison is not excluded for reasons like null checks, numeric types, or final constants.

org.sonar.java.checks.spring.SpringSecur.checker_desc: Detects invocations of methods that disable or weaken Spring Security's CSRF protection when called on a CsrfConfigurer instance.

org.sonar.java.checks.EqualsOverriddenWi.checker_desc: This checker detects when a class overrides either the equals method without also overriding hashCode, or overrides hashCode without also overriding equals.

org.sonar.java.checks.ThreadSleepCheck.checker_desc: Detects calls to `Thread.sleep(...)` that occur within a synchronized block or synchronized method.

org.sonar.java.checks.security.VerifiedS.checker_desc: This checker detects insecure SSL/TLS configurations where server hostname verification is disabled or missing.

org.sonar.java.checks.security.AndroidUn.checker_desc: This checker detects calls to Android database or shared preference APIs that create unencrypted storage, or Realm database configurations that lack encryption.

org.sonar.java.checks.RedundantTypeCastC.checker_desc: This checker detects unnecessary type casts that can be safely removed without changing the program's behavior.

org.sonar.java.checks.ToStringReturningN.checker_desc: Detects when a toString() or clone() method returns null.

org.sonar.java.checks.unused.UnusedPriva.checker_desc: This checker detects private fields that are declared but never read (used) outside of assignments to themselves, ignoring certain special cases and annotations.

org.sonar.java.checks.SynchronizationOnS.checker_desc: This checker detects synchronization on expressions that are of primitive types, certain forbidden reference types (like boxed types, String, time classes, etc.), or identifiers initialized with immutable collection factory methods.

org.sonar.java.checks.NonShortCircuitLog.checker_desc: Detects bitwise AND (&) or OR (|) operators used with boolean operands where the short-circuit logical operators (&&, ||) should be used instead.

org.sonar.java.checks.FixmeTagPresenceCh.checker_desc: This checker detects the presence of the "FIXME" tag in Java source code comments.

org.sonar.java.checks.security.AndroidUn.checker_desc: Detects usage of specific Java file I/O methods (Files.write, FileWriter, FileOutputStream constructors) within an Android development context, which may lead to unencrypted file storage security risks.

org.sonar.java.checks.NotifyCheck.checker_desc: This checker detects any invocation of the method named "notify" without parameters.

org.sonar.java.checks.WaitOnConditionChe.checker_desc: This checker detects calls to the `wait` method on instances of `java.util.concurrent.locks.Condition` and suggests using `await` instead.

org.sonar.java.checks.IgnoredOperationSt.checker_desc: This checker detects when the return value of certain method calls is ignored, either by being used as a standalone statement or assigned to a variable that is never used.

org.sonar.java.checks.ReturnInFinallyChe.checker_desc: This checker detects return, throw, break, or continue statements inside a finally block that can cause abrupt termination of the finally block, potentially suppressing exceptions from the try or catch blocks.

org.sonar.java.checks.CompareStringsBoxe.checker_desc: This checker detects equality comparisons (== or !=) between two strings or two boxed primitive types where neither operand is null and neither operand is a boolean constant, and suggests using equals() instead.

org.sonar.java.checks.SynchronizedOverri.checker_desc: This checker detects when a method overrides a synchronized method from a parent class but is not itself declared as synchronized.

org.sonar.java.checks.security.WebViewJa.checker_desc: This checker detects calls to the method `addJavascriptInterface` on objects of type `android.webkit.WebView` or its subtypes, which can expose sensitive information.

org.sonar.java.checks.security.CookieHtt.checker_desc: This checker detects creation or configuration of cookie objects without the secure "HttpOnly" flag enabled.

org.sonar.java.checks.ObjectFinalizeOver.checker_desc: This checker detects when a method named "finalize" with no parameters is declared as public instead of protected.

org.sonar.java.checks.synchronization.Tw.checker_desc: This checker detects calls to the parameterless `wait()` method when the current thread holds more than one lock (i.e., is within more than one synchronized context).

org.sonar.java.checks.StaticFieldInitial.checker_desc: This checker detects assignments to static non-volatile non-final object fields that are not performed within a synchronized block, static initializer, or lock-protected method, in classes that contain at least one synchronized method.

org.sonar.java.checks.security.WebViewJa.checker_desc: Detects enabling JavaScript support in Android WebView settings via setJavaScriptEnabled(true) calls.

org.sonar.java.checks.InterruptedExcepti.checker_desc: This checker detects catch blocks that handle InterruptedException or ThreadDeath (or generic Exception/Throwable that may contain them) without properly re-interrupting the thread or rethrowing the exception.

org.sonar.java.checks.DeadStoreCheck.checker_desc: This checker detects assignments to local variables that are dead stores, meaning the assigned value is never read before the variable is reassigned or goes out of scope.

org.sonar.java.checks.synchronization.Wr.checker_desc: This checker detects when a class's writeObject method is synchronized but no other method or synchronized block exists in the class, which can cause deadlocks during serialization.

org.sonar.java.checks.security.WebViewsF.checker_desc: This checker detects calls to specific WebSettings methods with a boolean argument set to true, which may enable unsafe file access in Android WebViews.

org.sonar.java.checks.OperatorPrecedence.checker_desc: This checker detects binary expressions where operator precedence is ambiguous and suggests adding parentheses for clarity, and also flags conditional expression operands that are complex and should be parenthesized.

org.sonar.java.checks.unused.UnusedLabel.checker_desc: This checker detects labeled statements whose label is never referenced by any break or continue statement.

org.sonar.java.checks.DoubleCheckedLocki.checker_desc: Detects double-checked locking patterns where a field is assigned inside a synchronized block and then used after the assignment within the same block, risking visibility issues.

org.sonar.java.checks.security.Cryptogra.checker_desc: This checker detects cryptographic key generation calls (KeyGenerator, KeyPairGenerator, ECGenParameterSpec) that use insufficient key sizes according to algorithm-specific minimums.

org.sonar.java.checks.SynchronizedFieldA.checker_desc: This checker detects synchronization on a field that is not private final and is assigned within the synchronized block.
